examples.title: English review
examples.description: Mixed-sentiment review with competitor mention — extracted to structured fields in under a second.
examples.input: So I bought the 'Turbo-Vac 5000' last week. Honestly? It's a mixed bag. The suction is incredible—it picked up a penny from under the rug! And it's super quiet, which my cat appreciates. But oh man, the battery life is a joke. It died after 15 minutes. Also, the plastic handle feels like it's going to snap any second. For $300, I expected better build quality. I'm keeping it because I hate returning things, but if I had to choose again, I'd definitely go with a Dyson instead.

cons: poor battery life — dies in 15 minutes

examples.title: Hindi (Devanagari) review
examples.description: Pure Devanagari script — fields extracted accurately including detected language.
examples.input: Syska चार्जर 2 दिन में ही टूट गया। बहुत खराब क्वालिटी है। दोबारा नहीं खरीदूंगा। पैसे बर्बाद हो गए। बिल्कुल निराश हूं।
examples.input_translation: (Translation: Syska charger broke in just 2 days. Very bad quality. Won't buy again. Money wasted. Completely disappointed.)

examples.title: Hinglish / code-mixed review
examples.description: Code-mixed Hindi-English — the differentiator. Western tools mislabel this; review-iq parses 'apple k earphone ko competition de dega' correctly.
examples.input: Superb earphone i like it.... and the sound is just awsome.... ye earphone apple k earphone ko competition de dega..... Not better than apple earphone... but km v nai hai apple k earphone se....
examples.input_annotation: "apple k earphone ko competition de dega" = will compete with Apple earphones | "km v nai hai" = not less than

examples.title: Genuine review → clear
examples.description: Natural first-person voice, specific details, balanced pros/cons. Precision-first disposition: clear (no further action needed).
examples.input: Bought this Realme Narzo 70 phone a month ago. Camera is excellent for the price, takes sharp photos even in low light. Battery easily lasts 2 days on light use. Fingerprint sensor is fast. The only downside is the bloatware — it comes preloaded with too many apps. Overall a great mid-range phone, would recommend to family.

output.label: genuine
output.reasons: Balanced assessment with specific, verifiable details (camera performance, battery life, fingerprint speed). Natural first-person voice. Cons included unprompted.

examples.title: Disclosed incentive → flagged_for_review
examples.description: Reviewer disclosed receiving the product for free (Amazon Vine). Under BIS IS 19000:2022 this is a material disclosure that triggers administrator review.
examples.input: I received this product as part of the Amazon Vine program in exchange for my honest review. The Philips air fryer performs well — good build quality and easy to clean. Crispy results on most foods tested. The only issue is the display can be hard to read in bright light.

output.label: suspicious
output.reasons: Explicit disclosure of incentivized review ('received in exchange for honest review'). Content itself appears balanced, but disclosed incentive requires administrator review per IS 19000:2022.

examples.title: Templated / fabricated → priority_review
examples.description: No specific product details, excessive superlatives, promotional phrasing. Heuristic + LLM both signal fabrication. Disposition: priority_review.
examples.input: AMAZING PRODUCT!! BEST PURCHASE I EVER MADE!! EVERYONE SHOULD BUY THIS RIGHT NOW!! WORKS PERFECTLY 100%!! HIGHLY RECOMMENDED TO ALL!! 5 STARS!! SUPERB QUALITY!! DO NOT HESITATE!!

output.label: likely_fake
output.reasons: All-caps promotional language, no specific product details, no balanced pros/cons, generic superlatives consistent with coordinated fake review patterns.

examples.title: Theme trends — by_language breakdown
examples.description: delivery_speed complaints appear only in Hindi and Hinglish reviews — zero in English. This vernacular-only signal is invisible to English-only tools.

examples.title: Authenticity audit view
examples.description: Org-level authenticity summary. Dispositions use IS 19000:2022 administrator-signal wording — no individual review is labelled or penalised.

output.moderation_note: Signals support human moderation under IS 19000:2022; dispositions are review priorities for an administrator, not verdicts.

examples.title: Review health score
examples.description: Composite score (sentiment 50% + urgency 20% + authenticity 30%) with confidence level and explainable components.

output.moderation_note: Health score is an org-level aggregate and does not label or score any individual review. Authenticity signals support human moderation under IS 19000:2022.

examples.title: CSV batch ingestion
examples.description: Upload a CSV of reviews; get back structured extraction for every row. Live ingestion takes ~48s for 100 rows — results shown here are from a recorded run.

input_csv.review_text: Excellent product, very durable and fast delivery.
Noise की smartwatch अच्छी है पर battery life thodi weak hai.
Pathetic quality yaar, broke in 3 days. Paisa waste hua bilkul.
Camera is okay but storage fills up too fast. Need 256GB option.
